common.copyManualHint: Press Ctrl+C to copy the text below:
common.copySelectHint: Text selected. Press Cmd+C (or Ctrl+C) to copy.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of your AI conversation collection
dashboard.installPlugins: Install plugins to start collecting AI conversations
dashboard.noDataYet: No data yet. Waiting for plugins to sync...

conversation.emptyDescription: Sync your AI conversations using Chrome or VSCode plugins.
conversation.notFoundDescription: This conversation could not be found. It may have been deleted.
conversation.confirmDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? All messages will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
conversation.batchDeleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {count} conversations? All messages will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.

search.title: Search Conversations
search.description: Search conversation titles and message content
search.placeholder: Search conversation titles or message content...
search.emptyDescription: Search conversation titles and message content. Supports Chinese and English.
search.noResultsDescription: No conversations containing "{keyword}" were found. Try a different keyword.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.cookieNote: *Preferences use cookies by default. You can switch between cookies, localStorage, or no storage in code.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage API keys and application settings

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: API keys are used to authenticate plugin requests. When at least one key exists, plugins must include it in their sync configuration.
apiKeys.emptyDescription: Without API keys, plugins can sync data freely. Create a key to restrict access.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.generateDescription: Give your API key a name to identify it later.
apiKeys.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete the API key "{name}"? Plugins using this key will no longer be able to sync.
apiKeys.createdDescription: Copy this key now. It will only be shown once.

versionCheck.title: Version
versionCheck.description: Check for new versions of Solvoke Synap Web.
versionCheck.upToDate: You are on the latest version.
versionCheck.checkFailed: Failed to check for updates. Please try again later.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.description: An error occurred while loading the page. Please try reloading.
error.pageNotFoundDescription: The page you are looking for could not be found.

versionCheck.webOutdated: Your Solvoke Synap Web (v{current}) is outdated. Latest: v{latest}.
versionCheck.upgradeHint: Pull the latest image and restart to upgrade.
